## Summary

- Describe the user-facing change.
- Note any workflow or configuration updates.

## Implementation Plan

- Path: `implementation-plans/<slug>.md`
- If no plan was needed, explain why.

## Validation

- List each command you ran.
- Mention tests added or updated.

## Skipped Checks

- Call out any checks you intentionally skipped and why.

## Notes

- Link the implementation plan when one was created.
- Mention any follow-up work or known risks.
